mapper.sql: utr . id , utr.created_by, utr.created_time, utr.updated_by, utr.updated_time, utr.is_default, utr.user_id, utr.state, utr.tenant_id
mapper.select: SELECT , t.state tenant_state, t.code tenant_code FROM def_user_tenant_rel utr LEFT JOIN def_tenant t on utr.tenant_id = t.id where utr.user_id = ${userId} order by utr.state desc, t.state desc, utr.is_default desc, t.created_time asc
